## Summary

Wires Phase 0 calibration and Pass 3b longform prompt to the new DREAM evaluation templates and mode contract. Adds the six-part diagnostic contract to Phase 0 so the LLM internalizes it before manuscript contact. Normalizes benchmark front matter per the DREAM index normalization rule.

## Scope

**Phase 0 gold standard** (`processor.ts`):
- Added EVALUATION MODES section: `short_form_evaluation`, `long_form_evaluation`, `long_form_multi_layer_evaluation` with mode contract authority reference
- Added SIX-PART CRITERION OPPORTUNITY CONTRACT: Evidence, Symptom, Cause, Fix direction, Reader effect, Mistake-proofing
- Zero opportunities allowed when writing is near-flawless (e.g. Dracula)
- Top Recommendations are summaries, not verbatim opportunity copies
- A/B/C proposals belong in Revise Queue only
- Updated calibration lock proforma with DIAGNOSTIC CONTRACT LOCKED section

**Pass 3b longform prompt** (`pass3b-longform.ts`):
- AUTHORITY section now references mode contract, multi-layer template, and benchmark index alongside gold-standard benchmarks
- Default evaluation mode changed from `STANDARD` to `long_form_multi_layer_evaluation`

**Authority chain comments** updated in `pass3b-longform.ts` and `runPass3bLongform.ts`

**Benchmark front matter normalization**:
- `froggin-noggin-dream.md`: upgraded from `canonical-13-v1` to `dream-longform-v2-governed-ledgers` schema with full front matter per DREAM index normalization rule
- `cartel-babies-dream.md`: added missing YAML front matter + repo note disclaimer
- `let-the-river-decide-dream.md`: added missing YAML front matter

**Test updates**:
- `gold-standard-shape.test.ts`: recognizes both `canonical-13-v1` and `dream-longform-v2-governed-ledgers` schemas, excludes V2 addenda (no score grid), dynamic score column detection for varied grid formats (4-col vs 5-col)
- `froggin-noggin-dream.test.ts`: updated expected schema to `dream-longform-v2-governed-ledgers`

**Does NOT touch**: scoring logic, pipeline execution, database schema, Revise behavior, UI rendering, evaluation artifact format.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Phase 0 prompt is longer — adds ~600 chars. Well within the 1000-token max_completion_tokens budget since these are input tokens.
- Benchmark front matter changes are metadata-only per the normalization rule. No benchmark body content was modified.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — documentation-only changes to Phase 0 calibration text (read-only primer), prompt comments, and benchmark metadata. No scoring, pipeline execution, schema, or artifact format changes."
